Code.Other: Security > Authenticators > Okta Verify: set FIPS Compliance to users enrolling in Okta Verify can use FIPS compliant devices only.

Recommendation.Text: Enable FIPS compliance for Okta Verify and restrict enrollment to FIPS-compliant devices.

Description: Okta Verify should require FIPS-compliant devices for enrollment when the organization must enforce FIPS-compliant authenticator usage.
Risk: If Okta Verify enrollment allows non-FIPS devices, users can authenticate with devices that do not meet the required cryptographic assurance.
